site.title: Priyanka Silambarasan - Front-End Web Developer
site.description: I'm a web developer based in Edmonton, Alberta, passionate about UI/UX, responsive design, accessibility, and performance optimization. My primary tools include HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Shopify, WordPress, and Figma.

intro.name: Priyanka Silambarasan
intro.summary: a front-end web developer with a strong focus on UI/UX, responsive design, accessibility, and performance

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Priyanka, a front-end web developer based in Edmonton, Alberta.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice include:
about.passion: I enjoy building responsive and user-friendly websites with a strong focus on design, usability, and performance. I'm especially interested in UI/UX, front-end development, and creating clean digital experiences.
about.approach: I like choosing the right tool for each project and building websites that are accessible, visually appealing, and practical for real users.
